programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: 'S2/E19'. Love Monster's calendar is missing a sticker so he doesn't know what celebration day it is today. He becomes too embarrassed to ask his friends so pretends he knows by copying them.

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: 'S2/E20'. Love Monster gets separated from Elder Panda in the Everything But Sprinkles Store and needs to make a plan to find him again.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Go Jet Academy: Wind Power'. The team race to save Glitch when his kite flies too close to the academy's windfarm.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E42 - Go Jet Academy: Irrigation'. Uh oh! Glitch accidently uses his size-ray to shrink the Go Jetters and Ubercorn so that they are the size of ants!

programme.title: Rastamouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Wicked Wednesday'. Wesley looks after the orphans - but when sister Sasha takes charge, the plan goes awry.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - T-Rex And Pumice'. Andy and Hatty create a brand new volcano exhibit in the dinosaur gallery at the National Museum, including a Tyrannosaurus Rex and a pumice stone.

programme.title: Andy's Prehistoric Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Gastornis and Egg'. Andy travels 49 million years back in time to find out what colour the eggs of a giant prehistoric bird were and must protect a chick against a colony of supersized ants.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E37 - Andy and The Darkling Beetle'. Andy checks out the Darkling Beetle, a nocturnal insect with bright markings. Andy heads to the Namib desert in Africa to discover how a darkling beetle drinks water.

programme.title: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programme.desc: When the toys of the Night Garden cant sleep, the Zonk leads them to the ZonkyZoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

programme.title: Catie's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Amphibious Machines'. Catie sees three machines that go on both land and water. She pilots a hovercraft, sees a machine that can go on land, sea and ice, and drives an amphibious tank.

programme.title: My Pet And Me: Vet Tales
programme.desc: 'S2/E21 - Trixie the Dog'. Ferne visits Sophie and her ability dog Trixie together they take Trixie to the vet for a check-up to make sure she's fit and healthy for her important role.

programme.title: My Pet And Me
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Sabah Spiny Stick Insects'. Rory visits Zac and meets his stick insects, Pixie, Mo and Simone.

programme.title: The Numtums
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - The Tent-O-Saurus'. Sandy discovers ten dinosaur bones and rebuilds a fearsome creature.

programme.title: The Numtums

programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - White Cliffs of Dover, England'. The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - A Movie Feast'. Postman Pat and his faithful cat Jess have joined the Special Delivery Service - they must deliver anything, anytime, anywhere.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Shirley Whirley'. Shirley is a big sheep and is having trouble moving around so Shaun sets her up with remote-controlled wheels. But the Farmer's TV remote interferes.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Little Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing little machines: a quadricycle, a ministox car and a self-build plane.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Hiccups'. Shirley drinks Bitzer's fizzy pop and gets a nasty case of hiccups, but none of the cures Shaun tries seems to work.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Washday'. After Shaun and the flock play with the clothes line the Farmer's washing is filthy, so the race is on to get it clean again before he finds out.

programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Claw'. When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - Early Baby'. Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.desc: 'S1/E42 - Hide and Seek'. It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: 'S11/E9 of 13 - Fear Of The Unknown'. Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: 'S11/E10 of 13 - Miscommunication'. Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy' when she and the girls bicker, but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 8 - Managing Mom'. Kris' busy schedule as working mother is getting to her, causing her to hire a nanny. Meanwhile, Kim contemplates firing her as a manager.

programme.desc: 'S2/E16 of 21 - Breast Greedy'. Dr Nassif works on a woman who had her first nose job at 12 years old. Dr Dubrow helps a patient who wants to retire her Baywatch boobs.

programme.title: Freejack
programme.desc: Bounty hunters from the future transport a doomed race car driver to New York City in 2009, where his mind will be replaced with that of a dead billionaire.

programme.title: 8 Mile
programme.desc: Eminem stars in this entertaining drama based on his life about a struggling young rapper. He has the opportunity to overcome his challenges and change his life.

programme.title: Dangerous Game
programme.desc: A footballer is forced into a life of crime to help clear his best friend from a gambling debt owed to gangsters.

programme.title: The Wine Of Summer
programme.desc: A frustrated actor travels to Spain in search of a playwright, a trip that unexpectedly binds him to a group of five previously unconnected people.

programme.title: Divorce Invitation
programme.desc: Mike is head over heels for a Jewish girl. Deep into his rabid infatuation, he rushes into marriage only to be blindsided by relentless nagging.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: This third installment of the iconic franchise starring Sam Neill sees a doctor being tricked into returning to the dinosaur run island, to help save their missing child.

programme.title: Hudson Hawk
programme.desc: A cat burglar is forced to steal Da Vinci works of art for a world domination plot.

programme.title: Ride Along 2

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A genetically inferior man assumes the identity of a superior one in order to pursue his lifelong dream of space travel.

programme.title: The Parole Officer
programme.desc: A failed parole officer framed for murder must enlist the help of his former clients to clear his name.

programme.title: Persecuted
programme.desc: An evangelist finds himself framed for murder and on the run after he refuses to back a senator's proposition calling for sweeping religious reform.

programme.title: D.E.B.S.
programme.desc: Plaid-skirted schoolgirls are groomed by a secret government agency to become the newest members of the elite national-defense group, D.E.B.S.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: The talented Amy Schumer stars in this unconventional, raunchy rom-com about a commitment-phobic and hard-partying magazine writer who falls for a sports doctor.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: A frustrated office worker discovers that he is the son of a professional assassin, and that he shares his father's superhuman killing abilities.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Trans-Siberian...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Trans-Siberian Adventure. S1/E3 of 3'. Joanna concludes her journey across Russia, travelling through deepest Siberia. She travels to the city where the Russian royal family was killed.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Tony goes on safari to find majestic machines that are inspired by the animal kingdom. We'll see an excavator that walks like a spider, and Tony gets hands-on with a live-saving mechanical octopus.

programme.title: The Psychedelic Drug Trial: A Cure...
programme.desc: 'The Psychedelic Drug Trial: A Cure for Depression?. S1/E1'. We follow the work of a pioneering team of scientists seeking to legitimise through serious scientific research, the use of class A drugs in the fight against depression.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S7/E11 - Croatia'. As one of the world's most in-demand sporting coaches, 43-year-old Nikola Boric once travelled the world, welcomed everywhere he went. Now, he lives in a wooden cabin without electricity, water or heating.

programme.title: The Highland Vet
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Vet Eilidh tries to solve the mystery of Julie's Indian Runner duck, Girly.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E14 - Falkirk Wheel'. In this episode, an impossibly huge project in China to divert water from the wet south to the bone-dry north - the total length is the same distance as New York to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Trans-Siberian...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Trans-Siberian Adventure. S1/E3 of 3'. Joanna concludes her journey across Russia, travelling through deepest Siberia. She travels to the city where the Russian royal family was killed.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Tony goes on safari to find majestic machines that are inspired by the animal kingdom. We'll see an excavator that walks like a spider, and Tony gets hands-on with a live-saving mechanical octopus.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - 111 W57th Street'. In this episode, the skinniest skyscraper on earth is being built in New York - can engineers find a way to build this ultra-tall slender building?

programme.title: Life Below Zero

programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - I Dug a Hole and Said a Prayer'. A pregnant woman and her 7-year-old son suddenly disappear. When police question her ex-lover, they suspect he is capable of violence.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Chase Me'. When a 50-year-old woman is found dead in her home, all that's left behind is a note that reads, 'Chase me.' Police search relentlessly for the remorseless psychopath.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - I Could Hear Her Calling My Name'. When a girl disappears after school, her last known steps are caught on CCTV. The footage leads detectives to two dark minds and a sinister crime.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Into the Woods at Midnight'. Three locals are found brutally murdered in a quaint village in Maine. The killer leads detectives into the woods, where he buried his fourth victim.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: 'S9/E11 - Breaking Away'. When popular college student Martin Roberts goes missing, only a cryptic note is left behind. Two years on, his family want to solve the mystery once and for all.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - A Killer's Bet'. When a football coach vanishes, police investigate a secret betting ring. A chain of clues leads them to one gambler who couldn't pay up.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Who Shot Darrent Williams?'. On New Year's Eve, NFL player and former Texas high school football star Darrent Williams is at a party. Soon after midnight, he's shot dead.

programme.title: Murder Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - The Message In Red'. When a beloved couple is gunned down and killed, a cryptic message scrawled across their bedroom wall leads police to suspect the crime may be drug related.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: 'S4/E17 - Unforeseen'. In Florida, a felon breaks into an elementary school, causing a code red alert. A traffic stop in Arizona escalates when the suspects steal an ambulance to flee.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: 'S4/E19 - Armed Response'. In Tennessee, officers arrive at an office where two women and a child are held hostage by a gunman. For 14 hours, officers attempt to secure their release.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Is That Blood?'. A mother disappears in Virginia, and her body is later found in an open field. Detectives uncover shocking footage that shows what happened in her final moments.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Down By Fire'. When a high school teacher is gunned down in Arizona after a night out, the community is shocked. Officers think they've found the killer, until a new witness emerges.

programme.title: Breaking Homicide
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Death At Dawn'. In 2015 Devan Schmidt's body is found half-naked and bruised in her home. The toxicology report suggests an overdose, but was it foul play at the hands of a new love?

programme.title: Breaking Homicide
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - A Deadly Encounter'. In 2013, 22-year-old Amber Bass was shot dead in her own driveway after a night out. Was this just a random act of violence or was a jealous lover involved?

programme.title: True Conviction
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Panic On The Parkway'. An unknown shooter murders a cop and an innocent motorist on the Cross Island Parkway in Nassau County, Long Island. Police embark on a huge manhunt.

programme.title: True Conviction
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - A Generational Curse'. When Jacob Craggett is murdered in a crossfire, it brings back terrible memories for his family, who lost another relative to gun violence ten years earlier.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - No Escape'. When Peggy returns to school to pursue her dream of becoming a doctor, she catches the eye of a fellow student. But, she has no idea of his dark and obsessive personality.

programme.title: Real Time Crime
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Hunted'. When a man is killed on camera outside an Atlanta hotel, police use license plate readers to solve the mystery. Texas police use a tiny detail to track robbers down.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: 'S5/E2'. An up-close and personal look at the front line of policing, using real footage from police body cameras. Life on patrol can be anything but routine.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Something Happened To Her'. When the body of popular high school student, Riley Crossman, is uncovered, the students and residents of Berkeley Springs become suspects.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - New Mexico Desert Killings'. A young woman vanishes from a New Mexico store. Then, a second woman disappears, and police are in a race against time to stop a potential serial killer.

programme.title: Understand Me
programme.desc: Atim, a local village girl will win the heart of her man if only she plays a better role than Nancy, a girl who lost Bassey all because of pressure from friends.

programme.title: The Accidental King

programme.title: Ghetto Boy

programme.title: Mal Kamper

programme.title: Kom Ons Praat Daaroor

programme.desc: Jack Nicholson and Adam Sandler face off in this crazy comedy. A man is wrongly sentenced to anger management treatment and is assigned to an eccentric therapist.

programme.desc: An all-star cast drives this fantastic animated Lego adventure. When the teenage son of a warlord is shunned by everyone, he and his fellow ninjas set out to regain his honor.

programme.desc: A silly adventure ensues for Surly the squirrel in this fun sequel. When the mayor of Oakton City plots to destroy their home, Surly and his friends must do all they can to stop him.

programme.desc: A canine space adventure. Two children and their parents help a trio of aliens who are transformed into friendly dogs to escape the clutches of a UFO hunter

programme.desc: An animated adventure based on the classic Mario video game franchise. With Princess Peach's help, Mario journeys through the Mushroom Kingdom to stop the all-powerful Bowser.

programme.desc: Don Johnson and Olga Kurylenko drive this action comedy. A couple's restaurant opening night turns into a battlefield when the local mobsters come to collect the husband's debt.

programme.title: Vampire's House Of Cain
programme.desc: A fanged crime thriller. A detective investigating a series of murders is caught in a war between two Vampire clans.

programme.title: Umma
programme.desc: Sandra Oh (Killing Eve) leads this chilling horror film. A single mother is forced to confront the traumatic past she fled many years ago when she inherits her dead mother's remains.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Killer Timing
programme.desc: This riveting instalment is loaded with twists and turns. Amy and Travis try to find a serial killer on the run with the help of an FBI agent who happens to be Travis' ex-wife.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Riddle Me Dead
programme.desc: Continuing the murder mystery franchise, Tess and Logan investigate the murder of a host of a popular game show that Tess has been invited to be a part of.

programme.title: Broadcast
programme.desc: Imagine living in a world free from ageing and death. In this sci-fi thriller starring Eric Roberts, an eccentric billionaire creates a drug that prevents ageing and death.

programme.title: Twisted Vines
programme.desc: A murder mystery that will keep you guessing. A wedding at a vineyard estate turns deadly when a body is discovered, and all the guests turn into suspects.

programme.title: To Catch A Spy
programme.desc: Mystery drives this film. A travel writer witnesses a murder at a hotel in Malta and teams up with an FBI agent to solve the case as the killer closes in.

programme.title: Sinister Sorority
programme.desc: A suspenseful thriller. An ambitious college student is excited to have a new sorority sister until she uncovers her sister's dark past.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Oscar-winning director Ang Lee and Eric Bana bring Marvel Comics' most destructive superhero to life in this captivating film that shows the origins of the big green monster.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds stars in this interstellar superhero film. After finding an alien ring, a pilot gains incredible powers and is inducted into an intergalactic police force.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury Of The Gods
programme.desc: Zachary Levi returns as Shazam in this hilarious sequel. While Billy and his foster siblings learn how to juggle their superhero lives, they face a vengeful trio of ancient gods.

programme.title: Detective Knight: Rogue
programme.desc: Bruce Willis propels this action film. After they shoot his partner, a veteran detective pursues a group of thieves from LA to New York but soon finds his past conflicting with his case.

programme.title: Detective Knight: Independence
programme.desc: Bruce Willis returns as Detective James Knight in a tense conclusion to the trilogy. Can he save the day when a vigilante threatens to blow up the city's Fourth of July festivities?

programme.title: Vanquish
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman and Ruby Rose lead this slick action thriller. An ex-cop forces a former drug courier to take out a series of gangsters, or she will never see her child again.

programme.title: Lyla
programme.desc: A psychological thriller mystery. A husband takes his family on a getaway to complete his first book but struggles to maintain his sanity after multiple visits from mysterious strangers.

programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Critical Condition'. Dee sees a Chihuahua with a life-threatening condition, a Macaw needing a beak trim and a gravely ill calf. Dee and Ken bring some fainting goats into the family.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Double Trouble In the Twin Cities'. The four remaining teams enter the Twin Cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul. Here they must serve food on a stick and use SPAM as their main ingredient.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - A Food Truck Kind Of Town, Chicago Is'. The teams face a pizza challenge judged by Chicago's mayor, then take part in a hot dog contest. Once they make $500, they can move onto the next city!

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Down To The Wire'. Dr. Dee checks a high-kicking pack horse, and Dr. Terry and Nicole head to Arctic Village for a remote clinic. Dr. Dee treats a dog with a cancerous-looking mass.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Farm Frenzy'. Dr. Dee flies her mom to a remote vet clinic in Manley Hot Springs, Alaska. At Animal House, a bunny has a tricky abscess, and some St. Bernard puppies visit the clinic!

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Tiger Triplets'. Bindi and the family plan an emotional surprise for Terri in the Crocoseum. Plus, Robert gets stuck in with helping the zoo's three new adorable tiger cubs.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics
programme.desc: 'S9/E4 - All Change'. Ina is in Brooklyn where she checks out new twists on old classics. She visits the Mile End Deli where they're modernising chopped liver and she makes bratwurst.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics
programme.desc: 'S9/E5 - Fun In The City'. Ina gets to cook in two incredible New York restaurants. At John Dory Oyster Bar she learns the secret to making oyster pan roast and uni butter crostini.

programme.title: Siba's Table
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Cape Crusader'. Siba serves up a tasty Cape Town-inspired brunch. She makes banana and cranberry granola, Cape Town tarts, a twist on 'ham and eggs' and a warm market salad.

programme.title: Siba's Table
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Cape Town Adventure'. Siba explores food adventures for an article. She challenges chef Luke Dale Roberts to cook with three mystery ingredients and checks out Cape Town food trucks.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E75 - Felix'. Students Marinette and Adrien transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir, to save Paris by capturing evil creatures, Akumas, which transform people into villains.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E108 - Sold to the Highest Fibber'. When Raven claims that she can't be pranked, Victor tries to pull an epic prank on her. Meanwhile, Booker helps Alice with a design disaster.

programme.desc: 'S6/E109 - Blues Beard's Revenge'. When Ivy returns from a cruise, acting completely different, Booker and Neil try to get her back to normal. Alice finds out an old rival is a student at her middle school.

programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Whatever Gets You Through the Night'. Herman has been invited to his first ever sleepover, but he is terrified because sometimes he does crazy things in his sleep.

programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Grandma's Here to Stay'. Dusty is stressed out when his Grandma moves into his house and is now sharing a room with him.

programme.desc: 'S3/E76 - Skiddley Whiffers, Tour de Ferb'. Candace holds the record for playing the game Skiddley Whiffers, but the boys decide to make a giant version round the town.

programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. The students of Viking Skool wake up to discover that all of the teachers have vanished.

programme.title: Vikingskool

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E83 - What a Croc!, Ferb TV'. Phineas and Ferb try to find an escaped crocodile. Perry discovers Doof has invented a chicken replaceinator and is going to replace his brother, the mayor, with a chicken.

programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Not So Honest Abe/The Best of Nin-tensions'. When Scratch tells Molly he can get Abe Lincoln to help with her project, he scrambles to cover his lie. When Mom and Grandma Nin aren't getting along, Molly makes them make up.

programme.desc: 'S4/E119 - Druselsteinoween/Face Your Fear'. When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs. As Doof searches for a hidden fortune, the boys help make the party spectacular.

programme.desc: 'S4/E120 - The Klimpaloon Ultimatum Part 1 and 2'. Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove Klimpaloon's existence in time for an awards ceremony, or he'll be barred forever from the world of fact-based song writing.
